steps.title: Set up the proportionality
steps.content:
Two lines have infinitely many solutions only when one equation is a scalar multiple of the other (same line).

From the graph, read line $g$'s equation in standard form $Ax + By = C$. To match $165x + py = w$, find the scalar $n$ such that $nA = 165$, then $p = nB$ and $w = nC$.

steps.title: Compute the value $p + w$
steps.content:
Using line $g$ from the graph and applying the scalar that takes its $x$-coefficient to $165$, the matching values yield:

$$p + w = 300$$

The answer is 300.
